LGIC.Advancement.Title: Level-Gated Item Choice
LGIC.Advancement.Hint: Choose items from a pool that expands or changes by advancement level.
LGIC.Config.NoItems: Drop items here to add them to the choice pool.
LGIC.Config.DropHint: Drop an item into this list, then set the level range where it can be selected. Leave Until Level blank if it remains available forever.
LGIC.Config.ContainerWarning: One or more selected pool items is a container. Containers may bring their own contents when granted.
LGIC.Warning.Unavailable: {name} is not available for this advancement at level {level}.
LGIC.Warning.InvalidSelection: One or more selected items are not available for this advancement at level {level}.
LGIC.Log.Registered: Registered Level-Gated Item Choice advancement type.
LGIC.Log.MissingConfig: Could not register Level-Gated Item Choice: dnd5e advancement configuration was not available.
LGIC.Log.NotDnd5e: Level-Gated Item Choice was not registered because the active system is not dnd5e.
